notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Brandon Marsh to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead homers (13) on a fly ball to left field. Dylan Crews scores.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds out, shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Alec Bohm.
